skills.name: Speed Boost I
skills.description: Increases your base speed.
skills.info_description: The first step to mastering your velocity.

skills.name: Speed Boost II
skills.description: Further increases your base speed.
skills.info_description: You begin to move with more confidence and celerity.

skills.name: Speed Boost III
skills.description: A significant enhancement to your speed.
skills.info_description: The world starts to feel a little slower.

skills.name: Speed Boost IV
skills.description: Your speed begins to warp the air around you.
skills.info_description: You leave a faint trail of displaced air in your wake.

skills.name: Speed Boost V
skills.description: You are a blur of motion.
skills.info_description: Objects appear to streak by as you move.

skills.name: Speed Boost VI
skills.description: The sound barrier is a suggestion.
skills.info_description: A faint hum is audible as you approach top speed.

skills.name: Speed Boost VII
skills.description: You move faster than thought.
skills.info_description: Your perception accelerates to match your speed.

skills.name: Speed Boost VIII
skills.description: Become a living current of the Speed Force.
skills.info_description: You have reached the pinnacle of raw speed.

skills.name: Kinetic Buildup
skills.description: Sprinting builds kinetic energy.
skills.info_description: Commit to the Path of Kinetic Energy. Locks the Static path.

skills.name: Kinetic Release I
skills.description: Release kinetic energy in a damaging burst.
skills.info_description: Unleashes a portion of your stored kinetic energy as a close-range blast.

skills.name: Kinetic Release II
skills.description: Increases the power of Kinetic Release.
skills.info_description: Your kinetic blast now has a wider area of effect.

skills.name: Kinetic Release III
skills.description: Further increases the power of Kinetic Release.
skills.info_description: Your kinetic blast now knocks enemies back.

skills.name: Kinetic Boost
skills.description: Expend kinetic energy for a temporary speed boost.
skills.info_description: Consumes all stored kinetic energy for a massive, but short-lived, burst of speed.

skills.name: Speed Siphoning
skills.description: Melee attacks steal speed from your target.
skills.info_description: Hitting an enemy briefly slows them and slightly increases your own speed.

skills.name: Overwhelming Force
skills.description: Your kinetic abilities have increased knockback.
skills.info_description: All abilities that knock enemies back do so with greater force.

skills.name: Bestow Speed
skills.description: Grant a burst of speed to a friendly target.
skills.info_description: Hit a friendly player or tamed mob to grant them a temporary speed boost.

skills.name: Kinetic Empowerment
skills.description: Your Bestow Speed now also grants a temporary strength boost.
skills.info_description: Empowers your allies even further by sharing your kinetic power.

skills.name: Infinite Mass Punch
skills.description: A devastating high-mass punch.
skills.info_description: After sprinting a long distance, your next punch deals massive damage.

skills.name: Static Buildup
skills.description: Sprinting builds up static electricity.
skills.info_description: Commit to the Path of Static Energy. Locks the Kinetic path.

skills.name: Static Release I
skills.description: Discharge static electricity in a damaging shock.
skills.info_description: Releases stored static energy, damaging all nearby entities.

skills.name: Static Release II
skills.description: Increases the power of Static Release.
skills.info_description: Your static discharge now has a greater range.

skills.name: Static Release III
skills.description: Further increases the power of Static Release.
skills.info_description: Your static discharge now applies a brief slowness effect to enemies.

skills.name: Lightning Throw
skills.description: Hurl a bolt of concentrated lightning.
skills.info_description: Consumes all static charge to throw a powerful lightning bolt.

skills.name: Chain Lightning
skills.description: Your lightning bolt can jump to multiple targets.
skills.info_description: After hitting its primary target, your lightning will chain to a nearby enemy.

skills.name: Projectile Catch
skills.description: Catch arrows and fireballs out of the air.
skills.info_description: When looking at a projectile, you will automatically catch it.

skills.name: Static Prison
skills.description: Trap an enemy in a cage of electricity.
skills.info_description: Creates a small, temporary cage of lightning around a target, trapping them.

skills.name: Phasing
skills.description: Vibrate through solid matter.
skills.info_description: Allows you to pass through 1-block thick walls made of simple materials.

skills.name: Phase Assault
skills.description: Your next attack after phasing deals bonus damage.
skills.info_description: For a short time after phasing, your melee attacks bypass armor.

skills.name: Ride the Lightning
skills.description: Teleport to your lightning strikes.
skills.info_description: Activating this ability after throwing lightning will teleport you to its impact point.

skills.name: Accelerated Metabolism I
skills.description: Your body processes substances faster.
skills.info_description: Positive and negative potion effects last half as long. Hunger depletes faster.

skills.name: Accelerated Metabolism II
skills.description: Your metabolism is incredibly rapid.
skills.info_description: You are now immune to poison and wither effects. Hunger depletes much faster.

skills.name: Metabolic Purge
skills.description: Instantly clear all active potion effects.
skills.info_description: Consumes a large amount of hunger to immediately remove all potion effects, good and bad.

skills.name: Adrenaline Rush
skills.description: Gain buffs at low hunger.
skills.info_description: When your hunger is below 50%, you gain a small passive speed and attack speed boost.

skills.name: Cyclone
skills.description: Create a vortex of wind with your arms.
skills.info_description: Rapidly rotating your arms creates a vortex that pulls in items and experience orbs.

skills.name: Cyclone Arms
skills.description: Your cyclone now pushes enemies away.
skills.info_description: The vortex created by Cyclone now also knocks back nearby enemies.

skills.name: Unseen Reflexes
skills.description: You have a chance to dodge melee attacks.
skills.info_description: Grants a small passive chance to completely avoid a melee attack.

skills.name: Kinetic Barrier
skills.description: Dodging an attack grants a temporary shield.
skills.info_description: After successfully dodging an attack with Unseen Reflexes, you gain a temporary absorption shield.

skills.name: Eye of the Storm
skills.description: Become immune to projectiles while cycloning.
skills.info_description: While the Cyclone ability is active, all incoming projectiles are deflected.

skills.name: Speed Mirage
skills.description: Create a short-lived afterimage to distract enemies.
skills.info_description: Spawns a decoy at your location that draws enemy attention.

skills.name: Afterimage Addition I
skills.description: You can now create an additional afterimage.
skills.info_description: Increases the maximum number of active mirages by one.

skills.name: Afterimage Addition II
skills.description: You can now create a third afterimage.
skills.info_description: Increases the maximum number of active mirages by one.

skills.name: Temporal Redo
skills.description: Rewind your position by a few seconds.
skills.info_description: Teleports you to where you were 3 seconds ago.

skills.name: Temporal Glitch
skills.description: Your attacks have a chance to freeze enemies in time.
skills.info_description: Your melee attacks have a small chance to apply a powerful, short-lived slowness effect.

skills.name: Time Remnant
skills.description: Create a temporal duplicate of yourself.
skills.info_description: Spawns a friendly, short-lived clone of yourself that will fight for you.

skills.name: Temporal Stasis
skills.description: Freeze an enemy in time.
skills.info_description: Hit an enemy to freeze them in place for a few seconds.

skills.name: Paradox
skills.description: Your temporal abilities are perfected.
skills.info_description: Time Remnants last longer, and Temporal Stasis can affect multiple targets.

skills.name: Momentum Control
skills.description: Gain better control over your movement.
skills.info_description: You no longer slip on ice and have improved control while airborne.

skills.name: Wall Kick
skills.description: Jump off of walls to gain height.
skills.info_description: Allows you to perform an extra jump when next to a wall.

skills.name: Ground Slam
skills.description: Slam into the ground from a great height.
skills.info_description: Falling from a height and activating this ability will create a shockwave on impact, damaging and knocking back enemies.

skills.name: Air Dash
skills.description: Perform a short dash in the air.
skills.info_description: Grants a short burst of momentum in the direction you are looking.
